title: Pride Blåhaj Backport
description: Backports the Blahåj Replushed mod's newer pride sharks to 1.20.1.
body:
# Pride Blåhaj Backport

Backports the [Blahåj Replushed](https://modrinth.com/mod/blaha-replushed) mod's newer pride sharks to 1.20.1.

A Minecraft mod that adds the IKEA BLÅHAJ Soft toy shark and a giant bread pillow as items.

| Item | Preview | Recipe |
|---|---|---|
| Soft Toy Shark		| ![A player holding a blue Blåhaj plushie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95ca437d6aff4dfe7dd70e3af83598d8d9a16613.png) | ![Crafting recipe for a blue Blåhaj plushie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/230b6bec3d7a9d564348daf43c85febe3b69880e.png) 			|
| Gray Toy Shark 		| ![A player holding a gray Blåhaj plushie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91a6e33b05204eef334ae96e9ce5442103cb7eac.png) | ![Trade interface for a gray Blåhaj plushie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ed9c5f104b57049090e8cbecbe41f364cefacc9.png) 		|
| Soft Toy Blue Whale	| ![A player holding a Blåvingad plushie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b619454d9198860a2b99a250fb215348d0060c5.png) | ![Crafting recipe for a Blåvingad plushie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3eabcde2903e22ce4b8a7341abb90af3ff4565d5.png) 		|
| Bread Pillow			| ![A player holding a large baguette plushie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/028ef4bb9c14781be6490655d5b7130a16795eb5.png)	  | ![Crafting recipe for a bread pillow plushie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/237344d373902754fc5a0ee4a86b4c1e3b7d3b41.png) 			|
| Pride Sharks			| ![Various pride-colored sharks lined up next to each other](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73a8a714bcbb310c928caa52e61bd5fccca6e649.png)       | ![Stonecutter interface with a Blåhaj plushie as the input, and various pride-colored versions as outputs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9cbcb20b7b615d1d15c94c2f6bb5222ccd0de3c.png)     		|
| Femboy Pride Shark	| ![A player holding a femboy flag colored Blåhaj plushie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebfaa4025c98ffe9dd562fab7137ec027a00bec9.png)    | Exclusive to this version, made with the stonecutter like other pride variants	|
